author: 4dpN
content:
## Sequencing

1. **Wait for agent WCWM-fFiy on issue #25** to finish (aligning .pre-commit-config.yaml black→26.1.0, removing stale #1111 ref, reformatting)
2. **Review PR #1165** — should have: sync function in update.py, aligned .pre-commit-config.yaml, reformatted files, clean Release Checklist
3. **Merge PR #1165** to master (squash or regular merge)
4. **Rebase all 7 open PRs** against updated master. Kick off one crosslink agent per branch:
   - fix/dynamic-test-ports-v2 (PR #1153)
   - feat/stealth-js-instrument-v2 (PR #1154)
   - feat/dynamic-ci-test-durations-v2 (PR #1155)
   - fix/dns-error-failure-limit-v2 (PR #1156)
   - feat/otel-tracing-v2 (PR #1157) — this one had spurious black reformats in build_cookie_table.py that should disappear after rebase
   - feat/sqlalchemy-postgresql-v2 (PR #1161)
   - feat/dns-failure-capture (PR #1164)
5. **Verify CI green** on all rebased PRs

## Why
Black version drift (24.10.0 in pre-commit vs 26.1.0 in conda) caused spurious reformats in PR #1157 and potentially others. Merging the alignment first means rebasing will produce clean diffs.

## Also pending (not blocked on this)
- Issue #15 / GH #1162: fix test_cache_hits_recorded (root cause identified, agent not kicked off)
- Issue #16 / GH #1163: fix test_browser_profile_coverage (DNS-gated assertions approach, depends on #1164 merge)
- Issue #7: Firefox pref cleanup (never completed)
